summary.zh-CN: 变更说明: 补充了配置、接口和多语言等配套支持，提升整体功能可用性。
summary.en: Change Summary: Added supporting work across configuration, APIs, and localization to improve overall feature readiness.

bodyHtml.zh-CN:
产品改进

补充了配置、接口和多语言等配套支持

  • 变更说明: 补充了配置、接口和多语言等配套支持，提升整体功能可用性。
  • 影响范围: 影响 i18n 相关功能、Web 客户端流程、adventures 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

完善了新手引导和辅助操作能力

  • 变更说明: 完善了新手引导和辅助操作能力，帮助用户更快上手关键流程。
  • 影响范围: 影响 adventures 相关功能、vault 相关功能、会话流程。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

完善了 HagiPower / Hero 相关功能与界面

  • 变更说明: 完善了 HagiPower / Hero 相关功能与界面，提升角色进度、展示和操作体验。
  • 影响范围: 影响 角色与职业元数据、adventures 相关功能、vault 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

问题修复

Code Server / VS Code 相关流程

  • 变更说明: 优化了 Code Server / VS Code 相关流程，减少入口分散和使用不一致的问题。
  • 影响范围: 影响 adventures 相关功能、vault 相关功能、会话流程。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

会话与消息流转细节

  • 变更说明: 优化了会话与消息流转细节，减少状态显示和交互过程中的混乱情况。
  • 影响范围: 影响 会话流程、conversation 相关功能、adventures 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。
bodyHtml.en:
Product Improvements

Supporting work

  • Change Summary: Added supporting work across configuration, APIs, and localization to improve overall feature readiness.
  • Impact: Affects I18n, web client flows, Adventures.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing supporting work entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Onboarding and guided flows

  • Change Summary: Improved onboarding and guided flows to help users reach key actions faster.
  • Impact: Affects Adventures, Vault, session workflows.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing onboarding and guided flows entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

HagiPower / Hero features

  • Change Summary: Expanded HagiPower / Hero features and UI to improve progression, presentation, and interaction experience.
  • Impact: Affects hero and role metadata, Adventures, Vault.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing hagipower / hero features entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Fixes

Code Server / VS Code flows

  • Change Summary: Refined Code Server / VS Code flows to reduce fragmented entry points and inconsistent behavior.
  • Impact: Affects I18n, core runtime behavior, interface behavior.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Session and message flow details

  • Change Summary: Improved session and message flow details to reduce confusion in status display and interaction flows.
  • Impact: Affects session workflows, Conversation.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing session and message flow details entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.
